title: All screens, Close button
scenario: Verify that the Close (X) button on every screen of the Onboarding flow closes the Onboarding and returns the user to the original screen (Supported Devices or Home screen).
steps: Open the app and navigate to the Onboarding flow.
On each screen of the Onboarding flow, locate and tap the Close (X) button.
Observe the screen that appears after tapping Close.
expected: The Onboarding flow closes and the user is returned to the original screen (Supported Devices or Home screen).
